Synthetic spec for Phase 7 variation: malformed citation excerpt

1 Scope

This fixture exercises the gate's Layer-1 byte-equality check
(schemas.md §10 invariant #11). The citation_excerpt stored in the
manifest deliberately does NOT match any text at the cited locator,
so the gate must reject the record.

2.4 Device initialization
The driver MUST perform the following steps, in order, before the
device is considered operational.
